company.segment_en: The credible #2 in AI accelerators and the inference value-play — Instinct GPUs + EPYC server CPUs, a direct TSMC leading-edge & CoWoS customer competing with NVIDIA for the same allocation
company.segment_zh: AI 加速器市場可信的第二名、也是推論的「性價比」標的 — Instinct GPU＋EPYC 伺服器 CPU，台積電先進製程與 CoWoS 的直接客戶，與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批配額
company.blurb_en: Four pillars on the #2 AI-accelerator challenger: how AMD raises realized compute price (Instinct generational ASP · HBM-capacity inference premium · EPYC share gains · ~12GW OpenAI+Meta lock-in) and where the ROCm-vs-CUDA gap pushes back · what to watch it with · its ~$8B AI-GPU revenue (Instinct, an estimate) inside a disclosed $5.8B/qtr Data Center segment · and how ~100% is TSMC N3→N2 + CoWoS + HBM.
company.blurb_zh: 對「AI 加速器第二名挑戰者」的四支柱：AMD 怎麼提高已實現算力售價（Instinct 世代 ASP · HBM 容量推論溢價 · EPYC 市占擴張 · OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 鎖定），以及 ROCm vs CUDA 差距如何反推 · 用什麼觀察 · 其 ~$8B AI-GPU 營收（Instinct，估計值）藏在已揭露的每季 $5.8B 資料中心分部內 · 以及這一切如何幾乎 100% 是台積電 N3→N2＋CoWoS＋HBM。

thesis_en: AMD is the credible #2 in AI accelerators and the inference value-play. Its edge is MEMORY: bigger HBM than NVIDIA every generation (288GB on MI355X vs 180GB on B200) lets customers run large models on fewer GPUs — a structural inference-TCO advantage as inference becomes ~2/3 of accelerator spend. Realized price rises through the Instinct generational ASP ramp (MI300→MI350→MI400/Helios), ~12GW of OpenAI + Meta commitments, and a record ~46% EPYC server-CPU share that funds the GPU push. The honest drag is ROCm: still trailing CUDA, so AMD prices as the value alternative to NVIDIA, not the price-maker — and the stock (~$559, +130% YTD, forward P/E ~62, the richest multiple of the big three) has run ahead of analyst targets, so the 2H-2026 MI400/Helios ramp must validate it. For TSMC, AMD is ~100% bound to N3→N2 + CoWoS + HBM, competing with NVIDIA for the same oversubscribed allocation.
thesis_zh: AMD 是 AI 加速器市場可信的第二名、也是推論的「性價比」標的。它的優勢在記憶體：每一代 HBM 容量都比 NVIDIA 大（MI355X 的 288GB vs B200 的 180GB），讓客戶用更少 GPU 跑大模型 — 當推論占加速器支出約 2/3，這是結構性的推論 TCO 優勢。已實現價格靠 Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯（MI300→MI350→MI400/Helios）、OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 承諾、以及替 GPU 攻勢買單的 ~46% EPYC 伺服器 CPU 市占推升。誠實的拖累是 ROCm：仍落後 CUDA，所以 AMD 以「NVIDIA 的性價比替代品」定價、而非定價者 — 且股價（~$559、YTD +130%、前瞻本益比 ~62，三巨頭中最貴）已跑在分析師目標價之前，因此 2H-2026 的 MI400/Helios 放量必須兌現。對台積電而言，AMD ~100% 綁定 N3→N2＋CoWoS＋HBM，與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批超額認購的配額。

headline.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

pricing.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

levers.name_en: Instinct generational ASP ramp (MI300 → MI350 → MI400)
levers.name_zh: Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯（MI300 → MI350 → MI400）
levers.mechanism_en: Each Instinct generation steps up capability and price: MI300X (192GB) → MI325X (256GB) → MI355X (288GB HBM3E, FP4/FP6, in production) → MI400/MI450 (HBM4, 2nm, ramping 2H 2026). The mix-shift to newer, higher-ASP parts raises realized price per GPU independent of any list-price move — the core engine as Data Center GPU revenue ramps.
levers.mechanism_zh: 每一代 Instinct 都在能力與價格上台階：MI300X（192GB）→ MI325X（256GB）→ MI355X（288GB HBM3E、FP4/FP6、量產中）→ MI400/MI450（HBM4、2nm、2H 2026 放量）。組合往更新、更高 ASP 的產品移動，與牌價無關地推升每顆 GPU 的已實現價格 — 是資料中心 GPU 營收放量時的核心引擎。
levers.observability_en: AMD Data Center segment revenue & growth, Instinct generation mix, MI355X/MI400 ramp commentary on earnings calls.
levers.observability_zh: AMD 資料中心分部營收與成長、Instinct 世代組合、法說會上 MI355X/MI400 放量評論。
levers.source_zh: AMD 季報與投資人資料

levers.name_en: HBM-capacity inference premium (more memory = fewer GPUs)
levers.name_zh: HBM 容量推論溢價（記憶體越大、用越少 GPU）
levers.mechanism_en: AMD has led NVIDIA on HBM capacity every generation (288GB MI355X vs 180GB B200, 141GB H200). For inference, more memory per GPU fits larger models / longer context on FEWER GPUs, cutting sharding overhead and TCO — the structural reason AMD can command price on memory-bound inference workloads even without the CUDA ecosystem.
levers.mechanism_zh: AMD 每一代的 HBM 容量都領先 NVIDIA（MI355X 288GB vs B200 180GB、H200 141GB）。對推論而言，每顆 GPU 記憶體越大，就能用更少 GPU 放下更大模型／更長上下文，降低分片負擔與 TCO — 這是 AMD 即便沒有 CUDA 生態、仍能在記憶體綁定的推論工作負載上要價的結構性原因。
levers.observability_en: HBM GB/GPU vs NVIDIA each generation, MLPerf/Signal65 inference benchmarks, named memory-bound inference wins (large-model serving).
levers.observability_zh: 每一代每顆 GPU 的 HBM GB 數 vs NVIDIA、MLPerf/Signal65 推論基準、具名的記憶體綁定推論勝出（大模型服務）。

levers.mechanism_en: OpenAI (6GW, multi-generation, warrants up to ~160M AMD shares) and Meta (6GW, custom MI450) together commit ~12GW of forward Instinct demand. These multi-year anchors lock volume and pricing reference points and validate AMD as a second source — the demand spine under the ASP ramp (with warrant dilution as the cost).
levers.mechanism_zh: OpenAI（6GW、多世代、認股權最高約 1.6 億股 AMD）與 Meta（6GW、客製 MI450）合計承諾約 12GW 的前瞻 Instinct 需求。這些多年期錨定鎖住量與定價參考點，並驗證 AMD 作為第二供應商 — 是 ASP 階梯底下的需求脊柱（代價是認股權稀釋）。
levers.observability_en: OpenAI/Meta deployment milestones, warrant vesting disclosures, new hyperscaler design wins (Microsoft/Oracle).
levers.observability_zh: OpenAI/Meta 部署里程碑、認股權行權揭露、新增雲端設計勝出（Microsoft/Oracle）。

levers.name_en: EPYC server-CPU share gains (the profitable base)
levers.name_zh: EPYC 伺服器 CPU 市占擴張（獲利基底）
levers.mechanism_en: EPYC reached a record ~46% of server-CPU REVENUE in Q1 2026 (from <1% in 2017). 'Venice' (Zen 6, TSMC N2, up to 256 cores) extends the lead. This high-margin, share-gaining franchise raises blended Data Center realized price and funds the Instinct push — a TAM AMD guides toward ~$120B by 2030.
levers.mechanism_zh: EPYC 在 2026 Q1 達到伺服器 CPU 營收約 46% 的新高（2017 年還 <1%）。「Venice」（Zen 6、台積電 N2、最高 256 核）延續領先。這個高毛利、持續搶市占的事業拉高混合資料中心已實現價格，並替 Instinct 攻勢買單 — AMD 指引此 TAM 到 2030 年約 $120B。
levers.observability_en: Mercury Research server-CPU revenue share, EPYC Venice ramp, Data Center segment CPU/GPU split commentary.
levers.observability_zh: Mercury Research 伺服器 CPU 營收市占、EPYC Venice 放量、資料中心分部 CPU/GPU 拆分評論。

levers.name_zh: Helios 機櫃整機（每次部署的含量）
levers.mechanism_en: Helios sells AMD as an integrated rack (72 MI455X-class GPUs, 31TB HBM4, 1.4 PB/s, EPYC Venice, UALink) rather than loose chips — AMD's answer to NVIDIA's NVL72. Rack-scale shifts the unit of sale up, raising dollar content and realized price per deployment as it ramps in 2H 2026.
levers.mechanism_zh: Helios 把 AMD 當成整櫃賣（72 顆 MI455X 級 GPU、31TB HBM4、1.4 PB/s、EPYC Venice、UALink），而非散裝晶片 — 是 AMD 對 NVIDIA NVL72 的回應。機櫃級把銷售單位往上抬，隨 2H 2026 放量提高每次部署的金額含量與已實現價格。
levers.observability_en: Helios shipment timing, rack ASP vs chip ASP, UALink/Open Rack adoption, MI455X volume.
levers.observability_zh: Helios 出貨時程、機櫃 ASP vs 晶片 ASP、UALink/Open Rack 採用、MI455X 出貨量。

levers.name_zh: ROCm vs CUDA 差距（性價比折價拖累）
levers.mechanism_en: ROCm 6.x reached near-parity for common inference workloads (vLLM/SGLang/HF support), but CUDA still leads decisively on ecosystem breadth, developer familiarity and time-to-productivity. To win against that lock-in, AMD must price BELOW NVIDIA as the value alternative — capping realized price even as capability matches. Software is AMD's #1 competitive gap.
levers.mechanism_zh: ROCm 6.x 在常見推論工作負載已接近持平（支援 vLLM/SGLang/HF），但 CUDA 在生態廣度、開發者熟悉度與上手速度仍明顯領先。要對抗這份鎖定，AMD 必須以「性價比替代品」定價、低於 NVIDIA — 即便能力追平也壓住已實現價格。軟體是 AMD 的頭號競爭差距。
levers.observability_en: ROCm adoption (vLLM/SGLang/framework support), AMD-vs-NVIDIA $/GPU and $/M-token gap, developer-mindshare signals.
levers.observability_zh: ROCm 採用（vLLM/SGLang/框架支援）、AMD vs NVIDIA 的每顆 GPU 與每百萬代幣價差、開發者心智占有訊號。
levers.source_en: ROCm release notes; SemiAnalysis cost models
levers.source_zh: ROCm 發行說明；SemiAnalysis 成本模型

pricing.engine_note_en: the Instinct generational ASP ramp, AMD's HBM-capacity lead for inference, ~12GW of OpenAI+Meta lock-in and record EPYC server share are doing the work — AMD is the credible #2, pricing as the value alternative to NVIDIA rather than the price-maker
pricing.engine_note_zh: Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯、AMD 在推論的 HBM 容量領先、OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 鎖定與創新高的 EPYC 伺服器市占在推動 — AMD 是可信的第二名，以「NVIDIA 的性價比替代品」定價、而非定價者

items.what_en: Data Center segment revenue & operating income (EPYC + Instinct bundled), total revenue, gross margin — the hard floor; Instinct itself is NOT broken out.
items.what_zh: 資料中心分部營收與營益（EPYC＋Instinct 合併）、總營收、毛利 — 硬底；Instinct 本身未單獨揭露。

items.name_zh: AMD 法說會與投資人資料
items.what_en: Data Center growth guide, Instinct ramp & MI400/Helios timing, OpenAI/Meta commentary, server-CPU TAM — where management frames the AI story.
items.what_zh: 資料中心成長指引、Instinct 放量與 MI400/Helios 時程、OpenAI/Meta 評論、伺服器 CPU TAM — 管理層框定 AI 故事的地方。

items.name_zh: AMD 股價（Nasdaq）＋分析師目標價
items.what_en: Live price, market cap, forward P/E (~62) vs NVDA/AVGO, consensus target (~$449, currently BELOW price) — the market's read on the MI400 ramp. Sentiment context, kept OUT of the score.
items.what_zh: 即時價格、市值、前瞻本益比（~62）vs NVDA／AVGO、共識目標價（~$449，目前低於股價）— 市場對 MI400 放量的判讀。屬情緒情境，排除在分數外。

items.name_zh: MLPerf Inference 與 SemiAnalysis 基準
items.what_en: Independent (and AMD-commissioned) MI355X-vs-B200 tokens/sec and cost-per-token — the cross-check on the HBM-capacity inference premium.
items.what_zh: 獨立（與 AMD 委託）的 MI355X vs B200 tok/s 與每代幣成本 — 對 HBM 容量推論溢價的交叉驗證。

items.name_zh: 台積電營收與先進製程／CoWoS 揭露
items.what_en: N3/N2 mix and CoWoS/HBM capacity — the supply ceiling AMD shares with NVIDIA; AMD+NVIDIA+Google+Amazon took >90% of CoWoS+HBM by value in 2025.
items.what_zh: N3/N2 結構與 CoWoS/HBM 產能 — AMD 與 NVIDIA 共用的供給天花板；2025 年 AMD＋NVIDIA＋Google＋Amazon 吃下 CoWoS＋HBM 價值的 >90%。

items.name_zh: Mercury Research 伺服器 CPU 市占
items.what_en: Quarterly EPYC vs Intel server-CPU unit & revenue share — the EPYC-lever observation point (record ~46% revenue share Q1 2026).
items.what_zh: 每季 EPYC vs Intel 伺服器 CPU 出貨與營收市占 — EPYC 槓桿的觀測點（2026 Q1 營收市占創新高約 46%）。

items.name_zh: OpenAI／Meta 承諾與認股權揭露
items.what_en: The ~12GW forward Instinct book, deployment milestones, and OpenAI warrant (up to ~160M shares) vesting — demand anchors AND dilution cost.
items.what_zh: ~12GW 前瞻 Instinct 訂單、部署里程碑、OpenAI 認股權（最高約 1.6 億股）行權 — 既是需求錨定，也是稀釋成本。

items.name_zh: ROCm 發行說明與框架支援
items.what_en: ROCm version cadence and vLLM/SGLang/HF/Modular support — the software-gap lever, narrowing fastest in inference.
items.what_zh: ROCm 版本節奏與 vLLM/SGLang/HF/Modular 支援 — 軟體差距槓桿，在推論端收斂最快。

estimates.method_zh: 資料中心 GPU（Instinct）營收年化
estimates.basis_en: AMD does NOT break out Instinct separately, so this ~$8B is a third-party ESTIMATE of 2025 Data Center GPU revenue, ramping hard with MI350/MI400. Comparable to NVIDIA DC GPU and Broadcom AI-semi run-rates. For the demand-side coverage view see /payback; for inference-share backdrop see /compute.
estimates.basis_zh: AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct，故此 ~$8B 為第三方對 2025 資料中心 GPU 營收的估計，隨 MI350/MI400 大幅放量。可與 NVIDIA DC GPU、Broadcom AI 半導體年化對比。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback；推論占比背景見 /compute。

estimates.method_en: Data Center SEGMENT revenue run-rate (disclosed; EPYC + Instinct)
estimates.method_zh: 資料中心「分部」營收年化（揭露值；EPYC＋Instinct）
estimates.basis_en: AMD discloses the Data Center SEGMENT: $5.8B in Q1 2026 (+57% YoY), annualizing to ~$23B. This bundles EPYC server CPUs WITH Instinct GPUs, so it is the disclosed floor — not AI-accelerator-only. Only the annualization is a projection.
estimates.basis_zh: AMD 揭露資料中心「分部」：2026 Q1 為 $5.8B（+57% YoY），年化約 $23B。它把 EPYC 伺服器 CPU 與 Instinct GPU 合併，因此是揭露的硬底 — 非純 AI 加速器。唯一推估是年化。

estimates.basis_en: OpenAI (6GW) + Meta (6GW) = ~12GW of multi-year Instinct commitments. The dollar value is a PRESS ESTIMATE (Meta alone reported >$100B potential; OpenAI 'tens of billions'), GW-based not AMD-disclosed, and OpenAI carries warrant dilution up to ~10%. A directional anchor, not a booked number.
estimates.basis_zh: OpenAI（6GW）＋Meta（6GW）＝約 12GW 多年期 Instinct 承諾。金額為媒體估計（光 Meta 報導潛在 >$100B；OpenAI「數百億」），以 GW 計、非 AMD 揭露，且 OpenAI 帶最高約 10% 認股權稀釋。為方向性錨點、非入帳數字。

benefit.disclosure_note_en: AMD does NOT break out Instinct (AI-GPU) revenue — the ~$8B headline is a third-party ESTIMATE. AMD discloses the Data Center SEGMENT ($5.8B in Q1 2026, +57% YoY) which bundles EPYC server CPUs with Instinct. The OpenAI (6GW) + Meta (6GW) ~12GW commitments are the forward driver (with warrant dilution as the cost).
benefit.disclosure_note_zh: AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct（AI-GPU）營收 — ~$8B 頭條為第三方估計。AMD 揭露的是資料中心「分部」（2026 Q1 $5.8B、+57% YoY），它把 EPYC 伺服器 CPU 與 Instinct 合併。OpenAI（6GW）＋Meta（6GW）的 ~12GW 承諾是前瞻驅動（代價是認股權稀釋）。

chain.role_zh: 當前 AI 訓練＋推論旗艦
chain.note_en: 288GB HBM3E (vs 180GB B200), FP4/FP6, in production. The HBM-capacity lead is the inference-TCO edge — and it is as TSMC-N3 + CoWoS-bound as any NVIDIA GPU.
chain.note_zh: 288GB HBM3E（vs B200 180GB）、FP4/FP6、量產中。HBM 容量領先是推論 TCO 優勢 — 而它與任何 NVIDIA GPU 一樣綁死台積電 N3＋CoWoS。

chain.role_zh: 次世代加速器、Helios 機櫃
chain.note_en: Sampling; production ramp 2H 2026. Pushes AMD onto TSMC 2nm + HBM4 — the make-or-break ramp the rich multiple is priced on. Node/HBM4 capacity are roadmap-attributed.
chain.note_zh: 送樣中；2H 2026 量產放量。把 AMD 推上台積電 2nm＋HBM4 — 那個被昂貴本益比定價的成敗放量。節點／HBM4 容量為路線圖歸因。

chain.note_en: 192GB / 256GB HBM, shipping since 2024 — the multi-die chiplet design that proved AMD's CoWoS + HBM packaging at scale.
chain.note_zh: 192GB／256GB HBM，2024 起出貨 — 證明 AMD CoWoS＋HBM 封裝可規模化的多晶粒 chiplet 設計。

chain.role_zh: 資料中心 CPU 事業（另一半）
chain.note_en: Up to 256 cores on TSMC 2nm; record ~46% server-CPU revenue share. An early, high-volume N2 customer — and the profitable base that funds the GPU push.
chain.note_zh: 台積電 2nm 上最高 256 核；伺服器 CPU 營收市占創新高約 46%。是 N2 的早期、高量客戶 — 也是替 GPU 攻勢買單的獲利基底。

chain.role_en: Integrated AI rack (72 GPU + EPYC + UALink)
chain.role_zh: 整合 AI 機櫃（72 GPU＋EPYC＋UALink）
chain.note_en: 72 MI455X-class GPUs, 31TB HBM4, 1.4 PB/s — AMD's answer to NVL72. Every die inside is TSMC leading-edge; rack-scale raises TSMC content per deployment.
chain.note_zh: 72 顆 MI455X 級 GPU、31TB HBM4、1.4 PB/s — AMD 對 NVL72 的回應。櫃內每顆晶粒都是台積電先進製程；機櫃級提高每次部署的台積電含量。

chain.note_en: The open-standard answer to NVLink — the interconnect that lets Helios scale, also on TSMC silicon. Maturity vs NVLink is a watch item.
chain.note_zh: 對 NVLink 的開放標準回應 — 讓 Helios 得以擴張的互連，同樣跑在台積電矽上。相對 NVLink 的成熟度是觀察項。

silicon.tsmc_read_en: AMD is ~100% TSMC-bound for advanced logic AND packaging: Instinct on N3 (MI350) → N2 (MI400), EPYC 'Venice' on N2, all CoWoS-packaged with HBM3E/HBM4. For TSMC, AMD is the #2 pillar of leading-edge AI-GPU demand and one of the earliest high-volume N2 customers (Venice + MI400). Crucially, AMD does NOT relieve TSMC's CoWoS bottleneck — it DEEPENS it: AMD, NVIDIA, Google and Amazon together consumed >90% of global CoWoS + HBM by value in 2025, and the two GPU makers compete for the SAME oversubscribed allocation. So whether buyers diversify toward AMD or stay with NVIDIA, TSMC fabs both — AMD is a second source for TSMC's customers, never a second source for TSMC itself, and the CoWoS/HBM ceiling stays the binding constraint TSMC controls.
silicon.tsmc_read_zh: AMD 在先進邏輯「與」封裝上 ~100% 綁定台積電：Instinct 走 N3（MI350）→ N2（MI400），EPYC「Venice」走 N2，全部以 CoWoS 搭配 HBM3E/HBM4 封裝。對台積電而言，AMD 是先進製程 AI-GPU 需求的第二根支柱，也是最早的高量 N2 客戶之一（Venice＋MI400）。關鍵是，AMD 並不紓解台積電的 CoWoS 瓶頸，反而加深它：2025 年 AMD、NVIDIA、Google 與 Amazon 合計吃下全球 CoWoS＋HBM 價值的 >90%，而兩家 GPU 廠競逐同一批超額認購的配額。因此無論買家轉向 AMD 還是續留 NVIDIA，台積電都製造兩者 — AMD 是台積電「客戶」的第二供應商、卻永遠不是台積電自己的第二供應商，CoWoS／HBM 天花板仍是台積電掌握的綁定約束。

proxies.name_zh: NVIDIA（NVDA）— AMD 對標的第一名
台積電（TSM）— 供給端 proxy

alerts.en: Realized-price engine running hot: pricing-power score 68.3/100 — the Instinct generational ASP ramp, AMD's HBM-capacity lead for inference, ~12GW of OpenAI+Meta lock-in and record EPYC server share are doing the work — AMD is the credible #2, pricing as the value alternative to NVIDIA rather than the price-maker.
alerts.zh: 已實現價格引擎火熱：定價權分數 68.3/100 — Instinct 世代 ASP 階梯、AMD 在推論的 HBM 容量領先、OpenAI＋Meta ~12GW 鎖定與創新高的 EPYC 伺服器市占在推動 — AMD 是可信的第二名，以「NVIDIA 的性價比替代品」定價、而非定價者。

alerts.en: GPU-scarcity proxy cooling: NVDA -11.83%/m — watch the accelerator-scarcity premium (capacity-block pricing) for follow-through.
alerts.zh: GPU 稀缺 proxy 降溫：NVDA -11.83%/月 — 留意加速器稀缺溢價（capacity-block 定價）是否跟跌。

alerts.en: Concentration: ~100% of the AI compute behind this benefit is TSMC-fabbed, 2 link(s) critical — the CoWoS bottleneck TSMC controls is the binding constraint on growth.
alerts.zh: 集中度：撐起此利益的 AI 算力約 100% 由台積電製造，2 條鏈關鍵 — 台積電掌握的 CoWoS 瓶頸即成長綁定約束。

alerts.en: AI benefit (headline est.) ≈ $8.0B revenue_runrate — AMD does NOT break out Instinct (AI-GPU) revenue — the ~$8B headline is a third-party ESTIMATE. AMD discloses the Data Center SEGMENT ($5.8B in Q1 2026, +57% YoY) which bundles EPYC server CPUs with Instinct. The OpenAI (6GW) + Meta (6GW) ~12GW commitments are the forward driver (with warrant dilution as the cost).
alerts.zh: AI 利益（頭條估計）≈ $8.0B revenue_runrate — AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct（AI-GPU）營收 — ~$8B 頭條為第三方估計。AMD 揭露的是資料中心「分部」（2026 Q1 $5.8B、+57% YoY），它把 EPYC 伺服器 CPU 與 Instinct 合併。OpenAI（6GW）＋Meta（6GW）的 ~12GW 承諾是前瞻驅動（代價是認股權稀釋）。

integrated_thesis.en: AMD is the credible #2, pricing as the value alternative to NVIDIA rather than the price-maker — but its realized-price engine (score 68.3, RAISING) is genuinely hot. The lever stack is generational ASP (MI300→MI350→MI400), an HBM-capacity inference premium (more memory = fewer GPUs), ~12GW of OpenAI+Meta lock-in, and record EPYC share funding the base. AI benefit today is a ~$8B Instinct run-rate ESTIMATE bundled inside a disclosed $23.2B Data Center segment; ~$100B forward TCV is the driver. Every accelerator is ~100% TSMC-fabbed — MI355X on N3, MI400 on N2 — so AMD's growth ceiling is TSMC's CoWoS+HBM allocation, the same pool NVIDIA fights for.
integrated_thesis.zh: AMD 是可信的第二名,以價值替代者而非定價主導者的姿態對標 NVIDIA——但其實現價格引擎(分數 68.3,上升)確實火熱。槓桿組合為世代 ASP(MI300→MI350→MI400)、HBM 容量帶來的推論溢價(記憶體多=GPU 少)、約 12GW 的 OpenAI+Meta 鎖定,以及創紀錄的 EPYC 份額支撐基本盤。當前 AI 收益為約 80 億美元 Instinct 運行率「估計值」,包在已揭露的 232 億美元資料中心分部內;約 1000 億美元前瞻承諾為動能。每顆加速器約 100% 由台積電代工——MI355X 用 N3、MI400 用 N2——AMD 的成長天花板即台積電 CoWoS+HBM 配額,與 NVIDIA 爭奪同一池。

pricing.en: Score 68.3, verdict RAISING, top lever generational_asp (str 80). AMD raises realized price up the stack: MI355X→MI400 ASP steps, an HBM-capacity premium (str 74) that lets buyers use fewer GPUs, and Helios rack content lifting per-deployment dollars. The ~12GW OpenAI+Meta lock-in (str 72) plus EPYC share gains (str 76) anchor the base. The one drag is the ROCm-vs-CUDA gap (str 40) — it forces a value discount, so AMD still prices as challenger, not price-maker.
pricing.zh: 分數 68.3,判定上升,首要槓桿為世代 ASP(強度 80)。AMD 沿產品階梯拉高實現價格:MI355X→MI400 ASP 遞增、HBM 容量溢價(強度 74)讓客戶用更少 GPU、Helios 機櫃內容提升單一部署金額。約 12GW 的 OpenAI+Meta 鎖定(強度 72)加上 EPYC 份額成長(強度 76)穩住基本盤。唯一拖累是 ROCm 對 CUDA 的差距(強度 40)——迫使價值折讓,故 AMD 仍以挑戰者而非定價主導者定價。

sources.en: Highest-signal: AMD 10-Q/10-K Data Center segment line (the only disclosed number — no Instinct-only break-out) and earnings-call ASP/margin commentary. Cross-check units via MLPerf Inference + SemiAnalysis benchmarks; server-CPU base via Mercury Research. The forward driver sits in OpenAI/Meta commitment & warrant disclosures (watch dilution cost). Supply ceiling read from TSMC advanced-node/CoWoS disclosures. ROCm release notes gauge the discount-drag closing.
sources.zh: 最高信號:AMD 10-Q/10-K 資料中心分部項目(唯一揭露數字——無 Instinct 單獨拆分)及財報電話會議的 ASP/毛利評論。用 MLPerf Inference 與 SemiAnalysis 基準交叉驗證出貨量;伺服器 CPU 基本盤看 Mercury Research。前瞻動能在 OpenAI/Meta 承諾與認股權揭露(留意稀釋成本)。供給天花板讀台積電先進製程/CoWoS 揭露。ROCm 發行說明評估折讓拖累是否收斂。

benefit.en: Treat carefully: AMD discloses NO AI-only line. The ~$8B Instinct revenue run-rate is a third-party ESTIMATE (medium confidence). What IS disclosed is the Data Center SEGMENT run-rate of $23.2B (EPYC + Instinct bundled, high confidence, ~$5.8B in Q1 2026, +57% YoY). The ~$100B OpenAI+Meta forward TCV is a low-confidence forward_commitment figure, not revenue — and carries warrant-dilution cost. So today's AI benefit is real but modest and inferred, with the big number still forward and unconverted.
benefit.zh: 謹慎看待:AMD 未揭露任何純 AI 項目。約 80 億美元 Instinct 收入運行率為第三方「估計值」(中信心)。有揭露的是資料中心分部運行率 232 億美元(EPYC+Instinct 綑綁,高信心,2026 財年 Q1 約 58 億美元,年增 57%)。約 1000 億美元 OpenAI+Meta 前瞻 TCV 為低信心承諾數字,非收入——且帶認股權稀釋成本。故當前 AI 收益真實但溫和且為推估,大數字仍在前方尚未轉化。

silicon.en: ~100% TSMC-fabbed, two critical links. MI355X (CDNA4) on N3 + CoWoS + 288GB HBM3E; MI400/MI450 (CDNA5) on N2 + N3 chiplets on advanced CoWoS + HBM4 (~432GB est) — this is the leading-edge escalation. MI300X/325X still on N5/N6 + CoWoS. Crucially, EPYC 'Venice' (Zen 6) and Helios rack integration also land on N2/N3. Every dollar of AMD AI compute is a TSMC wafer + CoWoS slot — AMD is a direct advanced-node customer, not indirect.
silicon.zh: 約 100% 台積電代工,兩條關鍵鏈。MI355X(CDNA4)用 N3+CoWoS+288GB HBM3E;MI400/MI450(CDNA5)用 N2+N3 小晶片、先進 CoWoS+HBM4(約 432GB 估)——這是先進製程的升級。MI300X/325X 仍在 N5/N6+CoWoS。關鍵是 EPYC「Venice」(Zen 6)與 Helios 機櫃整合也落在 N2/N3。AMD 每一分 AI 算力都是台積電晶圓+CoWoS 產能——AMD 是直接的先進製程客戶,而非間接。

tsmc_implication.en: AMD is a DIRECT leading-edge + CoWoS customer, not an indirect-via-NVIDIA one — every Instinct and EPYC part is TSMC silicon. That makes AMD strategically valuable as a second high-volume N3/N2 + CoWoS anchor beyond NVIDIA, deepening advanced-node demand. But the binding constraint is shared: AMD and NVIDIA draw from the same oversubscribed CoWoS+HBM pool. If AMD's ~12GW commitments convert, TSMC captures the upside regardless of who wins the GPU war — but AMD's ramp is gated by TSMC's allocation decisions. The leverage runs to TSMC.
tsmc_implication.zh: AMD 是直接的先進製程+CoWoS 客戶,而非透過 NVIDIA 的間接客戶——每顆 Instinct 與 EPYC 都是台積電矽晶。這使 AMD 在 NVIDIA 之外成為戰略上珍貴的第二個大量 N3/N2+CoWoS 錨點,深化先進製程需求。但約束共享:AMD 與 NVIDIA 共用同一超額認購的 CoWoS+HBM 產能池。若 AMD 約 12GW 承諾轉化,無論誰贏 GPU 之戰台積電皆獲上檔——但 AMD 的爬坡受制於台積電配額決策。籌碼在台積電手上。

scenarios.trigger_en: MI400/Helios ramp on schedule 2H 2026, OpenAI+Meta ~12GW begin converting, AMD merchant accelerator share >25%, Instinct run-rate >$15B.
scenarios.trigger_zh: MI400/Helios 於 2026 下半年如期爬坡,OpenAI+Meta 約 12GW 開始轉化,AMD 商用加速器份額 >25%,Instinct 運行率 >150 億美元。

scenarios.trigger_en: Blended Instinct ASP and Data Center margin rise even as units grow — segment gross margin expands >200bps with volume up.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 混合 Instinct ASP 與資料中心毛利上升即使出貨增長——分部毛利率擴張 >200bps 且量增。

scenarios.trigger_en: AMD wins deals but shipments supply-gated through 2027; Instinct run-rate stalls near $8-10B despite backlog.
scenarios.trigger_zh: AMD 拿下訂單但出貨受供給限制至 2027;儘管有積壓,Instinct 運行率停在約 80-100 億美元。

scenarios.name_zh: NVIDIA 價格戰/ROCm 差距持續
scenarios.trigger_en: Blackwell-Rubin cadence + AI-capex digestion; ROCm still trails CUDA; AMD multiple compresses from ~62x, share <15%.
scenarios.trigger_zh: Blackwell-Rubin 節奏加 AI 資本支出消化;ROCm 仍落後 CUDA;AMD 本益比從約 62 倍壓縮,份額 <15%。

falsification.en: Data Center segment run-rate decelerates below +30% YoY or Instinct estimates are cut below $6B — the realized-price ramp thesis breaks.
falsification.zh: 資料中心分部運行率減速至年增 <30% 或 Instinct 估計下修至 <60 億美元——實現價格爬坡論述破裂。

falsification.en: OpenAI/Meta ~12GW commitments slip, shrink, or carry warrant dilution that nets negative — the forward benefit driver collapses.
falsification.zh: OpenAI/Meta 約 12GW 承諾延後、縮減,或認股權稀釋淨負——前瞻收益動能崩解。

falsification.en: HBM-capacity advantage neutralized (NVIDIA HBM4 parity) and ROCm gap unclosed — value-discount drag deepens, ASP premium erodes.
falsification.zh: HBM 容量優勢被中和(NVIDIA HBM4 對等)且 ROCm 差距未收斂——價值折讓拖累加深,ASP 溢價侵蝕。

watch.en: NVDA momentum as scarcity proxy (currently -11.83%/m) — capacity-block pricing follow-through signals AMD's scarcity premium.
watch.zh: NVDA 動能作為稀缺性代理(目前 -11.83%/月)——產能區塊定價的延續性顯示 AMD 稀缺溢價。

watch.en: TSMC CoWoS + advanced-node allocation disclosures — the binding constraint on AMD's ramp.
watch.zh: 台積電 CoWoS 與先進製程配額揭露——AMD 爬坡的約束瓶頸。

watch.en: AMD Data Center segment run-rate & YoY growth in 10-Q (only disclosed proxy).
watch.zh: AMD 10-Q 資料中心分部運行率與年增(唯一揭露代理)。

watch.en: OpenAI/Meta commitment & warrant disclosures — conversion pace and dilution cost.
watch.zh: OpenAI/Meta 承諾與認股權揭露——轉化速度與稀釋成本。

watch.en: MLPerf Inference + SemiAnalysis benchmarks — Instinct competitive position vs Blackwell/Rubin.
watch.zh: MLPerf Inference 與 SemiAnalysis 基準——Instinct 對 Blackwell/Rubin 的競爭地位。

watch.en: ROCm release notes & framework support — is the value-discount drag closing.
watch.zh: ROCm 發行說明與框架支援——價值折讓拖累是否收斂。

watch.en: Mercury Research server-CPU share — EPYC profitable base health.
watch.zh: Mercury Research 伺服器 CPU 份額——EPYC 獲利基本盤健康度。

cross_links.label_zh: NVIDIA 鏡頭 — AMD 對標的第一名;兩家 GPU 定價者並排比較

cross_links.label_zh: 資本支出回本雷達 — 餵養 AMD 放量的 AI capex 回本了沒？

cross_links.label_zh: AI 算力需求雷達 — AMD 作為第二供應商的加速器需求

cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 同一算力價格堆疊的代工 ASP 端

blind_spots_en: AMD does NOT break out Instinct (AI-GPU) revenue — the ~$8B headline is a third-party estimate; only the Data Center segment (EPYC + Instinct) is disclosed.
Multi-GW OpenAI/Meta commitments are GW-based; dollar values (>$100B Meta) are press estimates, and OpenAI warrant dilution (up to ~10%) is a real cost.
Benchmark claims (MI355X ~1.3x B200) are largely AMD-commissioned / vendor-influenced.
Node/packaging for MI400 (N2) and HBM4 capacity (~432GB) are roadmap / industry-attributed, not AMD/TSMC-confirmed.
The stock has run +130% YTD ahead of analyst targets (~$449 avg below ~$559 price); live AMD/NVDA/TSM proxies are sentiment context, kept out of the pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: AMD 未單獨揭露 Instinct（AI-GPU）營收 — ~$8B 頭條為第三方估計；只有資料中心分部（EPYC＋Instinct）是揭露值。
多 GW 的 OpenAI/Meta 承諾以 GW 計；金額（Meta >$100B）為媒體估計，且 OpenAI 認股權稀釋（最高約 10%）是真實成本。
基準宣稱（MI355X ~1.3x B200）多為 AMD 委託／廠商影響。
MI400（N2）的節點／封裝與 HBM4 容量（~432GB）為路線圖／產業歸因，非 AMD／台積電確認。
股價 YTD +130% 已跑在分析師目標價之前（均 ~$449 低於 ~$559 股價）；即時 AMD/NVDA/TSM proxy 為情緒情境，排除在定價權分數外。
